LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. DEFENDANTS FOP DEVELOPMENT GROUP LLC, GREEN POWER GROUP LLC, PATRICK MCKAY, KARRIE BERCIK, GARY TAORMINA AND WAYNE SCHAFNIT'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND MOTION TO STAY LITIGATION IS GRANTED IN ITS ENTIRETY. THE ACTION IS STAYED PENDING ARBITRATION. ORDER SIGNED. (SEE SIGNED ORDER FOR DETAILS OF THE RULING.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF JAMES POWELL'S PETITION TO COMPEL DEFENDANTS TO COMPLY WITH PLAINTIFF'S STATUTORY RIGHT TO OBTAIN RECORDS IS OFF CALENDAR AS MOOT IN LIGHT OF THE GRANTING OF DEFENDANTS' PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY THE ACTION. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-21-2013 Continued To May-15-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Petition To Compel Defts To Comply With Pltf'S Statutory Right To Obtain Records
Off Calendar Mar-21-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Keith M. Velleca, Esq. of the Law Offices of Keith M. Velleca, Tel. 415.293.8048, for plaintiff and moving party;
William McCrane, Esq. of McCrane LLP, Tel. 415.766.3590, for defendant.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF JAMES POWELL's Petition To Compel Defendants To Comply With Plaintiff's Statutory Right To Obtain Records is Off calendar as moot in light of the granting of Defendants' petition to compel arbitration and stay the action. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Defendants Fop Development Group Llc, Green Power Group Llc, Patrick Mckay, Karrie Bercik, Gary Taormina And Wayne Schafnit'S Hearing Re: Petition To Compel Arbitration And Motion To Stay Litigation
Off Calendar Mar-21-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
William McCrane, Esq. of McCrane LLP, Tel. 415.766.3590, for defendant and moving party;
Keith M. Velleca, Esq. of the Law Offices of Keith M. Velleca, Tel. 415.293.8048, for plaintiff.

RULING: The matter was argued. DEFENDANTS FOP DEVELOPMENT GROUP LLC, GREEN POWER GROUP LLC, PATRICK MCKAY, KARRIE BERCIK, GARY TAORMINA AND WAYNE SCHAFNIT'S Petition To Compel Arbitration And Motion To Stay Litigation is Granted in its entirety. The action is stayed pending arbitration. Order signed. (See signed order for details of the ruling.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Ntc Of Petition To Compel Defts To Comply With Pltf'S Statutory Right To Obtain Records

MINI MINUTES:

Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition To Compel Arbitration And Motion To Stay Litigation
Off Calendar Mar-14-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted.
DEFENDANTS FOP DEVELOPMENT GROUP LLC, GREEN POWER GROUP LLC, PATRICK MCKAY, KARRIE BERCIK, GARY TAORMINA AND WAYNE SCHAFNIT'S Hearing Re: Petition To Compel Arbitration And Motion To Stay Litigation is continued to March 21, 2013 at 9:30 am in Department 302 in order to permit the moving party to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. The parties must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than March 14 at 4:00 pm. The court has courtesy copies of the opposition and reply. Pro Tem Judge: Rebecca Woodson, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/MJM

Petition To Compel Arbitration And Motion To Stay Action
Off Calendar Jan-07-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
DEFENDANTS FOP DEVELOPMENT GROUP LLC, GREEN POWER GROUP LLC, PATRICK MCKAY, KARRIE BERCIK, GARY TAORMINA AND WAYNE SCHAFNIT's Petition To Compel Arbitration And Motion To Stay Litigation is Denied, without prejudice. The copies of the Second Amended FOP Development Group, LLC Operating Agreement and Third Amended FOP Development Group, LLC Operating Agreements are unsigned. (Bercik Decl., Exhibits B, C.) Further, the FOP Development Group, LLC Purchase and Subscription Agreement, which incorporates the Operating Agreement as Schedule 2, is not attached to the Agreement. (Id. at Exhibit A.) Defendants' introduction of evidence in reply is improper and is not considered by the court. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: LaVenna Ward, CSR # 7077 =302/MJM
